Who We Are

More Than an Organisation —
A Movement

From Family Fun Days to community upliftment, Phila Sana brings people together through sport and shared purpose — tackling crime, GBV, mental health, and social issues one event at a time.

⚽
Sport for Change

Harnessing soccer, netball & fitness to build character, discipline and community pride.

🤝
Community First

Partnering with SAPS, Vodacom, NTT Toyota & local institutions to maximise impact.

🌱
Youth Development

Creating safe spaces for the youth to grow, compete, and discover their potential.

💪
Health & Wellness

Bootcamps, mental health awareness and active living to promote healthy lifestyles.

In Action

The Community Showing Up 💪🏾

2025
Founded & Growing
Our Story

Born From a Passion to Serve

Phila Sana — meaning "Live Healthy" in Zulu — was born from a deep belief that communities thrive when people come together. Based in Kabokweni, Mpumalanga, we bring institutions, corporates and ordinary people under one banner to fight the challenges facing our society.

From combating crime and gender-based violence to addressing mental health and bullying, we use the power of sport and community events to create lasting change. Our official launch in May 2025 was just the beginning — the movement is growing.

🎯

Our Mission

To unite communities through sport, health and social development — empowering every individual to live beyond measure.

👁️

Our Vision

A South Africa where every community has access to opportunities that uplift, inspire and transform lives.

❤️

Our Values

Ubuntu, integrity, inclusivity, excellence and a fierce commitment to community wellbeing.

#BeProudOfYourCommunity

What We Stand Against

Phila Sana actively works to combat the issues that tear communities apart.

🚫

Crime

✊

Gender-Based Violence

🧠

Mental Health Neglect

💊

Drug Abuse

😔

Bullying & Depression

⚖️

Social Inequality

What We Do

Our Programmes & Services

From competitive sport to wellness bootcamps, Phila Sana offers impactful programmes that bring people together and build stronger communities.

⚽
Community Soccer Tournaments

Competitive football tournaments bringing together schools, businesses, SAPS, hospitals and community clubs — open to all ages including under-15 development matches.

🏐
Netball Programmes

Empowering women and girls through netball — from grassroots participation to competitive play. Building confidence, teamwork and physical wellbeing.

💪
Fitness Bootcamps

High-energy bootcamp sessions led by certified trainers from Iron Ex. Promoting active, healthy lifestyles and mental resilience in communities across Mpumalanga.

🎉
Family Fun Days

Large-scale community events featuring soccer, netball, bootcamp, jumping castles, entertainment and youth activities — free general entry for the community.

🌍
Social Development Initiatives

Tackling crime, GBV, mental health and bullying through awareness campaigns aligned with the #BeProudOfYourCommunity movement.

🏆
Recognition & Awards

Celebrating excellence through trophies, medals and public recognition — honouring athletes, volunteers and community champions.
